plugins.name: claude-cortex
plugins.description: Always-on learning system — Claude gets smarter about you with every conversation. Passively observes preferences, captures knowledge, and adapts.

plugins.name: bizdev-outreach
plugins.description: Research a contact and draft personalized business development outreach.

plugins.name: lead-engine
plugins.description: Turn your LinkedIn network into a warm-lead engine. Catches buying signals, warms prospects via comments and connection requests, drafts DMs in your voice, runs a 3-touch cadence, and generates pre-call briefs.

plugins.name: weekly-alignment
plugins.description: Weekly cross-team alignment scanner. Monitors Slack channels for overlapping initiatives, conflicting priorities, and decisions that affect other teams — then delivers a Monday morning brief.

plugins.name: brightway-core
plugins.description: Generic business-ops toolkit. Pipeline Analyst (subagent) ranks your CRM pipeline by recency × signal × stage. Deliverable Reviewer (slash command) runs a structured QA pass on client decks/docs/spreadsheets against your brand guide. Configurable per user via /setup-core.

plugins.name: news-curator
plugins.description: Curate and draft a weekly LinkedIn news roundup. News Curator (subagent) scans newsletters and the open web for the week's most important stories ranked for your audience. Post Assembler (subagent) drafts the post in your voice. Configurable per user via /setup-news.
